    archivers/ark: switch from p7zip to 7-zip

    Add support for original 7-Zip and use it instead of p7zip.
    Full patch has been submitted upstream:

    https://invent.kde.org/utilities/ark/-/merge_requests/90

    PR:             260866 261368
